scripts.check: node --check curved-ray-accretion.js && node --check main.mjs && node --check space-integrators.js && node --check space-gpu-probes.js && node --check space-transfer-stage.js && node --check space-lab.mjs && node --check space-browser.mjs && node --check route-wrappers.test.mjs && node --check capture.mjs && node --check validate-artifacts.mjs && node --check validate-curved-ray-contracts.mjs && node --check validate-transform-contracts.mjs && node --check validate-wormhole-reference-rays.mjs && node --check validate-temporal-history.mjs && node --check validate-generated-starfields.mjs && node --check generated-starfields-browser.mjs
scripts.validate: node validate-curved-ray-contracts.mjs && node validate-transform-contracts.mjs && node validate-wormhole-reference-rays.mjs && node validate-temporal-history.mjs && node space-integrators.test.mjs && node main.mjs --smoke && node validate-generated-starfields.mjs
scripts.validate:unit: node validate-curved-ray-contracts.mjs && node validate-transform-contracts.mjs && node validate-wormhole-reference-rays.mjs && node validate-temporal-history.mjs && node space-integrators.test.mjs && node route-wrappers.test.mjs && node main.mjs --smoke
scripts.validate:quick: npm run check && npm run validate:unit && npm run test:mutations
scripts.validate:full: npm run validate:quick && npm run validate:artifacts
